svg.title: DDQ workflow as four layers — Digital Employee, Agents, Skills, Human in the loop
svg.desc: Vertical workflow showing the Digital Employee owning the outcome, eight specialist agents performing the work, the skills they call, and the human gates required for high-tier questions.
svg.text: One Digital Employee owns the outcome. Agents do the work. Skills are what they call. Humans gate what they can't.

g.text: Owns the run end-to-end · accepts the DDQ from intake to sealed delivery
KPI: auto-pass rate, library hit rate, P95 latency, hallucination rate, cost per DDQ

svg.text: Stage 4 · Validation · four guardrails in parallel
